source_filter.interpretation: Use predeclared route-specific goal-validity rows, not the bounded recovered rows used to design the relation-depth guarded rejection rule.

missing_evidence_for_actual_arbitration_: fresh object-relation observation plan for route-specific candidate ids
fresh frame/projection/detector/SAM2 substrate for route-specific object-relation candidates
candidate-local relation-depth evidence rows for route-specific candidates
same rule application before evaluation label join

promotion_rules.source_precheck_only: Passing this contract freezes a fresh/predeclared validation source. It does not validate terminal utility.
promotion_rules.actual_validation_needed: The relation-depth guarded arbitration rule can be validated only after object-relation evidence is generated for these predeclared rows and the rule is applied before label join.

interpretation_rule.fact: The bounded arbitration rule was designed on recovered rows rival_identity:12 and rival_identity:14.
interpretation_rule.agent_inference: The route-specific goal-validity rows are a better fresh/predeclared validation source if they do not overlap with the bounded rows and retain only action-time candidate evidence before label join.
interpretation_rule.user_decision_needed: None for freezing the validation source. User judgment is needed only before promoting a future non-inert terminal policy.
